name: ubereats-clone
description: Full-stack UberEats clone built using Angular for the frontend and Node.js (Express) for the backend. Includes restaurant listings, user authentication, food ordering, and real-time order tracking features. Developed collaboratively by a 4-member team (2 frontend, 2 backend). ## 🧱 Tech Stack - **Frontend:** Angular 18, TypeScript, SCSS - **Backend:** Node.js, Express, JWT Auth, MongoDB / PostgreSQL - **Tools:** GitHub, Postman, VS Code
